challenges_to_other_seats.reason: The selected/master silhouette corresponds, Blessed disgrace is visible through lowered head and ruined regalia, and the fixed eye, compressed brow, and open-hand accusation provide criterion-specific psychology. The contrary findings require a stronger facial exaggeration than the brief requires.
This duplicates the unsupported Korath psychology escalation under KORATH-001; visible face and hand evidence supports coercive martyr accusation.
The ingratiating smile, sidelong eye, forward lean, and invasive reaching hand visibly combine likability with betrayal; calling this merely a generic thief ignores the pose-face contradiction.
Erased facial contours, hollow eyes, crouched asymmetry, and dissipating anatomy visibly establish nonhuman supernatural cost; the alleged slick finish is not a demonstrated hard-matte failure.

The face lacks the required fear-and-force contradiction, so the ID survives. Claims that the whole role, correspondence, threat, cost, and 96px read all fail are cumulative overreach not needed to sustain it.
The frozen master does not establish a hard-matte or professional-finish failure independent of the valid rough-correspondence and face-psychology defects.
The diagonal ligament effect, caster gesture, and silhouette preserve mage/line identity at reduced scale. This is not enough evidence for a separate role-and-96px blocker.
The lateral clamp is visibly present, and localized flesh sheen does not independently violate the approved hard-matte anchor. Malachor remains blocked by the stronger face-pose finding.

The asserted androgynous-lane/roster-distinctness failure is not a required gate and is unsupported as identity criticism. The same ID survives only for the B/C evidence that the generic righteous scowl fails Sable's villain psychology.

Whole-cut black-leather, gloss, split-drape, and garment-template claims are contradicted by visible variation in body plans, props, supernatural anatomy, and female construction. GROUP-001 survives only for repeated stern/scowling emotional cadence; GROUP-002 is a duplicate of that surviving concern or an unsupported material claim, and GROUP-003 is unsupported garment overreach.

Predator anatomy supports B's pass, but the human-youth first read and the visually held rather than clearly body-grown bow remain plausible frozen-byte readings. Neither side conclusively refutes the other, so dissent is protected.

concessions.concession: A/B evidence confirms that Veyra's passive symmetry and concealed face do not establish hostile closure, target, villain intent, or the horror exception.
A/B evidence supports that the rough set lacks three genuinely distinct silhouettes and the master face does not visibly carry concealed panic beneath ownership.
Quillith's hauteur is visible, but care, ownership, fear, and causal cost are not sufficiently legible; the apparatus remains vulnerable to a weapon-like reduced-scale read.
Kett remains a generic bruiser in face and pose, while chain, coin, and polished-leather channels create defensible Cartel clutter and material concerns.
Luna's neutral heroic face does not communicate her required villain psychology despite adequate role readability.
Malachor's central face and pose read trapped and sorrowful rather than entitled panic, so the face-pose psychology blocker survives.
B/C evidence sustains the generic righteous-scowl villain-psychology failure after A's unrelated gender-lane claim is removed.
Repeated stern, scowling, or emotionally neutral faces create a defensible group-level psychology convergence finding.

protected_dissent.dissent: Seat B reads predator/nonhuman first and accepts the body-grown weapon; Seats A/C read human youth first, and Seat C cannot verify a body-grown connection from the frozen master. The conflict is not refuted by the available bytes and therefore blocks READY.

final_unit_dispositions.rationale: Correspondence, Blessed disgrace, threat, and accusatory psychology are visibly supported.
Hostile closure, target, villain intent, and horror-exception legibility are absent.
Rough silhouettes and selected correspondence need clarification; concealed panic is not face-readable.
Smile, eye line, lean, and invasive hand visibly carry the required contradiction.
Protected unresolved dissent remains on age/horror first read and body-grown weapon correspondence.
Erased face, hollow eyes, crouch, and dissipating anatomy visibly establish the nonhuman cost.
The required fear-and-force contradiction is not visible in face and pose; broader claimed failures are cleared.
Care, ownership, fear, causal cost, and reduced-scale support identity remain insufficiently legible.
Generic bruiser psychology and localized Cartel-channel clutter/material issues survive.
Role readability survives, but the face remains neutral/heroic rather than villain-specific.
The face-pose read is trapped sorrow rather than entitled panic; clamp and matte claims are cleared.
Generic righteous scowling fails villain psychology; gender-lane and duplicate blocker claims are cleared.

group_disposition.rationale: Only emotional/face convergence survives. Whole-cut material, gloss, garment-template, and split-drape findings are cleared as overreach or duplication.
